mapper.select: select user_id from `data_align_following_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from following where user_id = #{userId}
select note_id from `data_align_note_like_count_temp_${tableNameSuffix}` order by id limit #{batchSize}
select count(*) from note_like where note_id = #{noteId} and status = 1
